---
jupyter:
  jupytext:
    text_representation:
      extension: .Rmd
      format_name: rmarkdown
      format_version: '1.2'
      jupytext_version: 1.19.1
  kernelspec:
    display_name: Python 3 (ipykernel)
    language: python
    name: python3
---

```{python}
# %load_ext autoreload
# %autoreload 2
```

```{python}
import torch
import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
```

```{python}
import dneumc
```

```{python}
from dneumc.ising.ising import fast_gen_states
from neumc.utils.stats_utils import bootstrap, ac_and_tau_int, torch_bootstrap
```

```{python}
from dneumc.ising.ea import Energy
```

```{python}
ea_dir = 'data'
```

```{python}
Lx = 4 
Ly = 6 
```

```{python}
spins = fast_gen_states(Lx*Ly).view(-1,Lx,Ly)
```

```{python}
J = torch.ones(2,Lx,Ly)
```

```{python}
Energy(spins,J)
```

```{python}
name ='4x6_b0900'
```

```{python}
beta = 0.9
```

```{python}
cfgs = torch.from_numpy(np.fromfile(f"{ea_dir}/cfg_{name}.bin", dtype="int8").reshape(-1,Lx,Ly))
```

```{python}
J = torch.from_numpy(np.loadtxt(f"{ea_dir}/j_{name}.txt").reshape(2,Lx,Ly))
```

```{python}
J
```

```{python}
em = torch.from_numpy(np.loadtxt(f"{ea_dir}/em_{name}.txt"))
```

```{python}
em.shape
```

```{python}
torch.abs(em[:,0] - Energy(cfgs,J)).max()
```

```{python}
em[:,1].mean()
```

```{python}
tau, ac = ac_and_tau_int(em[::1,1].numpy())
tau 
```

```{python}
plt.hist(em[:,0], bins=50);
```

```{python}
energy = Energy(spins,J)
```

```{python}
mag = spins.sum((1,2))
```

```{python}
energy
```

```{python}
plt.hist(energy,bins=50, weights=np.exp(-beta*energy), );
```

```{python}
Z = torch.exp(-beta*energy).sum()
```

```{python}
Z
```

```{python}
m_e = torch.sum(energy*torch.exp(-beta*energy))/Z
```

```{python}
em[:,0].mean()
```

```{python}
em[:,0].std()/np.sqrt(len(em))
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
ac_and_tau_int(em[::1,0].numpy())
```

```{python}
m, err = torch_bootstrap(em[::1,0],n_samples=100,binsize=10)
print(f"{m} {err}")
```

```{python}
em[:,0].std()/np.sqrt(len(em))
```

```{python}
(m_e-m)
```

```{python}
m_e
```

```{python}

```

```{python}
m_am = torch.sum(torch.abs(mag)*torch.exp(-beta*energy))/Z
```

```{python}
m_am/(Lx*Ly)
```

```{python}

```
